code-mode-toggle.title: Code Mode Toggle
code-mode-toggle.description: A single block snippet for switching to Code mode in query editors (Prometheus, Loki, SQL, etc.).

datasource-picker.title: Data Source Picker
datasource-picker.description: A single block snippet for selecting a datasource using the standard data source picker input.

expand-collapse-arrow.title: Expand/Collapse Arrow Icon
expand-collapse-arrow.description: Highlights the down-arrow icon used to expand or collapse a section. `doIt` is disabled because many pages have multiple such arrows.

guided-hover-and-click.title: Guided: Hover to Reveal and Click
guided-hover-and-click.description: A guided snippet for hover-to-reveal interactions: hover over an item to reveal buttons, then click.

logs-drilldown-nav.title: Navigate to Logs Drilldown
logs-drilldown-nav.description: A multistep snippet for navigating to Drilldown > Logs from the main menu.

logs-drilldown-tabs.title: Logs Drilldown Tab Navigation
logs-drilldown-tabs.description: Selectors for Labels, Fields, Patterns, and Logs tabs in Logs Drilldown.

metrics-drilldown-nav.title: Navigate to Metrics Drilldown
metrics-drilldown-nav.description: A multistep snippet for navigating to Drilldown > Metrics from the main menu.

metrics-drilldown-tabs.title: Metrics Drilldown Tab Navigation
metrics-drilldown-tabs.description: Selectors for the Breakdown and Related metrics tabs in Metrics Drilldown.

multistep-datasource-picker.title: Multistep: Datasource Picker
multistep-datasource-picker.description: A multistep snippet for selecting a datasource: click picker, then select the datasource.

multistep-save-dashboard.title: Multistep: Save Dashboard
multistep-save-dashboard.description: A multistep snippet for saving a dashboard: click Save Dashboard, enter name, click Save.

nav-menu-item-click.title: Navigation Menu Item Click
nav-menu-item-click.description: A single block snippet for clicking items in the left navigation menu. Requires navmenu-open.

panel-menu-explore.title: Open Explore from Panel Menu
panel-menu-explore.description: Opens the Explore view from a panel's menu. Note: The panel menu selector contains the metric/panel name which varies.

panel-menu-log-volume.title: Log Volume Panel Menu
panel-menu-log-volume.description: Selector for the Log volume panel menu using wildcard to handle dynamic log counts.

query-textarea-formfill.title: Query Textarea Formfill
query-textarea-formfill.description: A single block snippet for entering queries into the code editor textarea.

run-query-button.title: Run Query Button
run-query-button.description: A single block snippet for clicking the Run query button in Explore and query editors.

save-dashboard-button.title: Save Dashboard Button
save-dashboard-button.description: The Save dashboard button in the toolbar (upper-right). Use this for highlighting the button; see multistep-save-dashboard.json for the full save flow.

tab-button-pattern.title: Tab Button Pattern
tab-button-pattern.description: Generic pattern for clicking a named tab — replace `{TabName}` with the actual tab label (e.g. 'Slow traces', 'Breakdown').

time-picker.title: Time Picker
time-picker.description: Global time picker button selector, works across Explore, dashboards, and drilldown apps.

traces-drilldown-nav.title: Navigate to Traces Drilldown
traces-drilldown-nav.description: A multistep snippet for navigating to Drilldown > Traces from the main menu.

traces-drilldown-tabs.title: Traces Drilldown Tabs
traces-drilldown-tabs.description: Selector for the Slow traces tab in Traces Drilldown.
